name: ai-doc-generator
description: Generate backend project documentation from source code using Gemini.

scripts.check:bin: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const entry=fs.readFileSync('bin/docgen.js','utf8');if(!entry.startsWith('#!/usr/bin/env node')){throw new Error('Missing shebang in bin/docgen.js')}console.log('CLI shebang check passed.')"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check:bin && npm run check:pack

author: khush
